incentive.statement: The application must have one fixed interface copy path, with no interface-language control or runtime label-switching lane.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate shell, runtime, presentation, and focused verification removal without changing grammar-language profiles or Andrews authority.

outcome: The Interface language control and its Nawat-label switching runtime are absent; the existing original interface copy is the sole presentation path.

responsibilities.statement: Remove the control markup and all dedicated responsive styling.

actors.contribution: Removed the Interface language checkbox, label, and dedicated layout rules.

responsibilities.statement: Remove language-switch initialization, mutation, listeners, and state reads while preserving the fixed original label helpers used by rendering.

actors.contribution: Deleted the switch API and listeners, removed its stored-label carrier, and fixed remaining rendering label selection to the original interface path.

responsibilities.statement: Prove the control, styles, runtime switch functions, and DOM state reads are absent and the canonical runtime remains intact.

actors.contribution: Added hostile source assertions and completed focused UI, runtime-manifest, syntax, alignment, and browser checks.

responsibilities.statement: Record the bounded removal and its evidence without claiming unrelated active worktree changes.

actors.contribution: Recorded the implementation boundary, retirement evidence, focused checks, browser proof, and external alignment blockers.

retirements.removalEvidence: The shell, stylesheet, and accessibility label contain no Interface language control.
The canonical modules contain no language DOM lookup, changeLanguage API, initLanguageSwitch call, or OriginalLabels carrier.

closure.detail: The interface-language control, runtime switching API, listener, and stored label carrier are absent; one fixed interface-copy path remains.

evidence.detail: Focused UI verification passed 402/402 across three matched suites; all changed modules passed node --check; runtime manifest remained aligned at 1 browser entry, 75 modules, and 75 installers; git diff --check passed.

Fresh-origin proof loaded stylesheet interface-language-removed-088 and current module entry lesson11-result-continuity-046; the DOM contained zero interface-language controls, zero #language carriers, zero matching accessibility labels, zero visible Interface language labels, and zero warning/error logs.

Architecture metrics remained at baseline and the browser runtime stayed singular. The gate remains red for the pre-existing live-board expansion and overlapping active-action coverage of unrelated dirty paths; this action records its own touched paths and actors.
